requirement_topic.en: Malta Grid Connection Review — IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and 230/400 V 50 Hz Parameters
requirement_topic.zh: 马耳他并网审查——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及230/400V 50Hz参数
requirement_topic.zht: 馬耳他併網審查——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及230/400V 50Hz參數

summary.en: Malta solar PV inverters for grid connection should follow project-level review by REWS and utility-side interconnection practice at Enemalta, with EU CE-compatible evidence. Key evidence includes anti-islanding operation under IEC 62116 and utility-interface behavior under IEC 61727, plus a settings and commissioning package for a 230/400 V, 50 Hz system. Malta is an EU member, so compliance is typically positioned through CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU, EMC 2014/30/EU, RED 2014/53/EU, and EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542 where storage interfaces are involved. Main import and interconnection logistics commonly route through Valletta and Marsaxlokk. The 50 Hz frequency aligns with China, but nominal voltage differs from China 220/380 V and requires validation.
summary.zh: 马耳他并网光伏逆变器应遵循REWS的项目级审查和Enemalta的电网连接实践，提交与欧盟CE兼容的证据。关键证据包括IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口行为验证，并需提交适用于230/400V、50Hz系统的设置与调试文件。马耳他为欧盟成员，合规通常通过LVD 2014/35/EU、EMC 2014/30/EU、RED 2014/53/EU及涉及储能接口时的EU电池法规2023/1542下的CE路径来处理。主要进口与并网文件常通过瓦莱塔和Marsaxlokk的物流链。其50Hz与中国一致，但标称电压与中国220/380V不同，必须进行适配验证。
summary.zht: 馬耳他併網太陽能光伏逆變器應遵循REWS的專案級審查和Enemalta的電網連接實務，提交與歐盟CE兼容的證據。關鍵證據包括IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面行為驗證，並需提交適用230/400V、50Hz系統的設置與調試文件。馬耳他為歐盟成員，合規通常透過LVD 2014/35/EU、EMC 2014/30/EU、RED 2014/53/EU及涉及儲能介面的EU電池規範2023/1542下的CE路徑來處理。主要進口與併網文件常經過瓦萊塔與Marsaxlokk的物流鏈。其50Hz與中國一致，但標稱電壓與中國220/380V不同，必須進行適配驗證。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
LVD 2014/35/EU and RED 2014/53/EU harmonised CE-marking routes (project-level interpretation), and EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542 where relevant
REWS interconnection and network-management requirements for grid-connected generation assets
Enemalta interconnection, commissioning and operational coordination process

summary.en: Chinese export documents often cite GB/T 19964-2024, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 37408 for grid-connection and inverter performance, with domestic acceptance and anti-islanding settings validated against 220/380 V, 50 Hz. These Chinese references can support engineering background but cannot be treated as automatic substitutes for Malta REWS/Enemalta project review or EU CE evidence mapping.
summary.zh: 中国出口文件常引用GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004以及GB/T 37408用于并网与逆变器性能说明，且通常按220/380V、50Hz下的国内验收和防孤岛设定进行验证。这些中国文件可支持工程背景，但不能自动替代马耳他REWS/Enemalta项目审查或EU CE证据映射。
summary.zht: 中國出口文件常引用GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004以及GB/T 37408用于併網與逆變器性能說明，且通常按220/380V、50Hz下的國內驗收和防孤島設定進行驗證。這些中國文件可支持工程背景，但不能自動替代馬耳他REWS/Enemalta專案審查或EU CE證據映射。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China grid-connection reports are not directly transferable to Maltese REWS/Enemalta review. Exporters should revalidate inverter firmware, reconnection delay, ride-through, voltage windows, and anti-islanding behavior against 230/400 V, 50 Hz, and supply Type 2/CCS2-compatible connection documentation for on-site installation. Coastal commissioning in Malta also requires salt-mist, humidity, thermal derating, earthing and surge-protection evidence linked to the actual project.
gap.zh: 差距：中国并网报告不能直接用于马耳他REWS/Enemalta审查。出口商应重新核验逆变器固件、重连延迟、穿越能力、电压窗口和防孤岛行为在230/400V、50Hz下的适用性，并提交符合Type 2/CCS2的连接文档用于现场安装。马耳他沿海工程还需提供盐雾、湿度、热降额、接地和浪涌保护证据，并与实际项目绑定。
gap.zht: 差距：中國併網報告不能直接用於馬耳他REWS/Enemalta審查。出口商應重新核驗逆變器韌體、重連延遲、穿越能力、電壓窗口和防孤島行為在230/400V、50Hz下的適用性，並提交符合Type 2/CCS2的連接文件用於現場安裝。馬耳他沿海工程還需提供鹽霧、濕度、熱降額、接地和浪湧保護證據，並與實際項目綁定。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for projects requiring REWS acceptance and Enemalta interconnection conditions, including grid stability and settings evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese GB/T/NB/T and domestic settings are not automatic substitutes for Maltese REWS interconnection acceptance

source.publisher: Regulator for Energy and Water Services (REWS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not assume voltage parity between China and Malta. China 220/380 V evidence can only be re-used after explicit validation for Malta's 230/400 V, 50 Hz interconnection settings and REWS/Enemalta process requirements. Prepare project-specific commissioning evidence for Type 2/CCS2, anti-islanding, reconnection timing and coastal reliability.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不要假设中国与马耳他电压完全一致。中国220/380V证据只有在明确验证其对马耳他230/400V、50Hz并网参数和REWS/Enemalta流程要求适用后才能复用。应准备项目专用的调试证据，包括Type 2/CCS2、 防孤岛、重连延时和沿海可靠性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不要假設中國與馬耳他電壓完全一致。中國220/380V證據只有在明確驗證其對馬耳他230/400V、50Hz併網參數和REWS/Enemalta流程要求適用後才能複用。應準備專案專用的調試證據，包括Type 2/CCS2、防孤島、重連延遲和沿海可靠性。
